---
title: "Billboard Demo"
description: "A simple side-by-side Solidity and Move walkthrough using a message billboard contract."
sidebar:
  label: "Demo"
---

The billboard example is the smallest useful migration exercise in this guide: a contract that stores and reads messages on-chain.

It is intentionally simple so you can focus on syntax and state-model differences instead of app complexity.

## Source code

- [Billboard Solidity source](https://github.com/aptos-labs/move-by-examples/tree/main/billboard/solidity)
- [Billboard Move source](https://github.com/aptos-labs/move-by-examples/tree/main/billboard/move)

## What to pay attention to

- Solidity `contract` becomes a Move `module`
- `msg.sender` becomes `&signer`
- contract storage becomes a resource such as `Billboard`
- `external` / `view` functions map to `entry` / `#[view]`
- events, errors, and tests all use Move-native syntax

## Chapter order

1. [Modules and initialization](/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/billboard/module-initialization)
2. [Functions](/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/billboard/functions)

5. [Events](/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/billboard/events)
6. [Errors](/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/billboard/errors)
7. [Testing](/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/billboard/testing)
